title: Supply Chain & Third-Party Risk
description: Manage supply chain and third-party risks associated with external library dependencies. Architect a lifecycle for tracking End-of-Life (EOL) dates and security vulnerability Service Level Agreements (SLAs) for dependencies.
objectives: Manage supply chain and third-party risks associated with external library dependencies.
Architect a lifecycle for tracking End-of-Life (EOL) dates and security vulnerability Service Level Agreements (SLAs) for dependencies.
